extraction.one_line_summary: MÄDER attacked 3.3km from summit finish, held off BERNAL's chase by 12 seconds to win after being caught on line at Paris-Nice.
tactical_patterns: INEOS crosswind acceleration on descent shattered field before climb, pre-positioning BERNAL for reduced group summit sprint.
MOHORIČ burned himself domestique-style early on final climb, enabling MÄDER's attack 3.3km out against isolated rivals.
MARTÍNEZ attacked first from peloton triggering cascading responses, tactical error spending energy before steeper gradients.
MARTIN bridging alone to BERNAL group shows climbing resurgence; positioning himself as GC dark horse.
VALTER inheriting maglia rosa 15+ minutes down demonstrates Groupama-FDJ sacrificed breakaway stage control for unexpected GC opportunity.

rider_signals.MÄDER Gino: positive: finally converted near-miss form into stage win, tactical maturity holding 12s gap final kilometer under BERNAL pressure
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: INEOS crosswind setup and finish sprint strength signals form building, only 16s off lead after aggressive racing
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: only rider bridging to BERNAL group independently shows resurgent climbing, half-minute gap to next favorites
rider_signals.VALTER Attila: neutral: inherited rosa 15+ minutes down from breakaway, Groupama gambled stage over GC protection
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: finishing in BERNAL/MARTIN group at half-minute confirms climbing credibility against pure climbers
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: dropped from BERNAL's group on decisive 15km climb, half-minute gap suggests vulnerable on sustained gradients
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: lost 15+ minutes suggests illness/crash/abandon or catastrophic collapse, major pre-race favorite elimination
rider_signals.MOHORIČ Matej: positive: pulling breakaway then pacing climbers early reveals exceptional domestique range on mixed terrain
rider_signals.BOUCHARD Geoffrey: positive: bridged to early break through odyssey effort then took KOM points, targeting mountains classification aggressively
